title: Physical Education Teacher
description:
Knightsbridge House International School

We're Hiring: Physical Education (PE) Teacher

Location: Changi Campus, Singapore
Availability: Immediate joiners will be given priority


About the Role

We are seeking a passionate and energetic Physical Education (PE) Teacher to join our growing Changi Campus. The ideal candidate will inspire students through high-quality sports instruction, promote health & wellness, and contribute to a vibrant school community.


Key Responsibilities

  • Plan, deliver, and assess developmentally appropriate PE lessons
  • Teach fundamental movement skills, sportsmanship, and teamwork
  • Lead sports ECAs, school events, and physical activity programmes
  • Ensure a safe, positive, and inclusive learning environment
  • Maintain equipment and support school facilities usage
  • Collaborate with academic and pastoral teams
  • Uphold school policies, safeguarding standards, and child protection guidelines

Requirements

  • Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education / Sports Science / related field
  • Teaching qualification (PGCE, PGDE, Dip Ed, etc.) preferred
  • Experience in primary or EY/elementary PE teaching
  • Passion for physical activity, sports coaching & youth development
  • Familiarity with international school curriculum preferred
  • Strong classroom and behaviour-management skills
  • Energetic, creative, and committed to student well-being

Immediate availability is an advantage.


Why Join Us?

  • Progressive and supportive learning environment
  • Multicultural, internationally-minded community
  • Professional growth & development opportunities Innovative and expanding school network

Job Types: Full-time, Contract

Contract length: 24 months

Benefits:

  • Health insurance

Work Location: In person

postedCompany.description:
An International Cambridge Accredited School for Parents Seeking High-Quality, Affordable Education in Singapore.

The school offers the Cambridge International Curriculum for Year 1 (age 5) to Year 13 A Levels (age 18).

The school was founded by John Fearon. Mr .Fearon is also the founder of the Invictus Group of schools. Knightsbridge House Management Team is very experienced in providing affordable quality education in Asia Pacific.

Since Knightsbridge House was founded in 2021 the school has grown to 600 students. It has two campuses in Singapore (Bukit Merah and Changi), one campus in Thailand and one coming soon in Japan.

KBH is a proud provider of affordable quality education. Fees are as low as $13080 and have not been increased for 4 years whilst never compromising on quality and world class educational outcomes.

For example KBH achieved the highest average test scores globally for the Cambridge Year 7 MIDYIS assessment for three years in a row: 2022-2023, 2023-2024 and 2024-2025 school years. See https://www.kbh.edu.sg/cambridge-year7-results. The school has excellent Mathematics results in particular, the school achieved joint first-place in Singapore Mathematics Challenge 2025. Special mention must be made of the KBH Year 9 Checkpoint Mathematics results in particular where KBH students scored an average of 81%. See https://www.kbh.edu.sg/cambridge-year-9-checkpoint-examination-results-2025.

Students at KBH are immersed in a multicultural, inclusive, and collaborative community that fosters a nurturing learning environment where all students grow to their fullest potential.
postedCompany.name: KNIGHTSBRIDGE HOUSE INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL PTE. LTD.
